overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a medieval village during a dramatic sunset. The character walks through timber-framed houses, passes villagers, and stops at a stone wall to observe the red-orange sunset over distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village center with timber-framed tavern

events.description: child runs past Geralt on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village center toward the main timber houses

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing running past the player character

entered.detail: large two-story medieval building with timber framing and lit windows
wooden stable structure with sloped thatched roof
unpaved dirt path with scattered stones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval village center at dusk, approaching timber-framed buildings with warm interior lighting. A child runs past on the right as the character moves along the dirt path between structures.

events.description: exits the village buildings into open terrain facing the sunset
sun becomes visible on the horizon creating strong orange backlight

agents.ego_description: walking away from the village toward the open sunset overlook

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the path
bright orange sun low on the horizon
mountain range silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, Geralt walks into an open field with a stone wall on the right. The scene opens to reveal a dramatic sunset with the sun visible on the horizon and distant mountains silhouetted against the orange-red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge path with wooden structures

events.description: turns back toward the village edge, leaving the open field
passes a wooden cart parked on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the village perimeter passing villagers and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villagers sitting outside a timber house

entered.detail: row of medieval timber-framed houses with thatched roofs
wooden wagon with large wheels parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns back toward the village edge, walking along a cobblestone path lined with timber houses. He passes a wooden cart on the left and villagers sitting outside their homes, while the stone wall recedes into the background.

events.description: stops walking and stands at the stone wall to observe the sunset

agents.ego_description: standing still at the stone wall, occasionally turning to view the sunset panorama

entered.detail: bright orange sun sitting low on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt stops at a stone wall overlooking the valley, facing the dramatic sunset. The camera pans slightly as the character stands in silhouette against the vibrant orange sky, with the stone wall prominent in the foreground and the sun setting behind distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village that gradually opens into a wide, dramatic vista of a sunset over distant mountains. It begins with Geralt walking through the village center along a dirt path, passing timber-framed buildings with warm interior lights as a child runs past. As he leaves the village behind, the scene expands into an open field where a stone wall guides the way toward a horizon bathed in orange-red light. The camera then follows as he turns back toward the village edge, moving along a cobblestone path past a wooden cart and villagers resting outside their homes. Finally, the movement settles as Geralt stops at the stone wall, standing in silhouette against the vibrant sky while the camera pans to capture the sun setting behind the silhouetted mountains.
